Class DateLabelFormatter

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.JFormattedTextField.AbstractFormatter
ui.gui.components.formatters.DateLabelFormatter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DateLabelFormatter extends JFormattedTextField.AbstractFormatter
DateLabelFormatter is a custom formatter for JFormattedTextField that formats date values in the "yyyy-MM-dd" pattern.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Loris

    • stringToValue

      public Object stringToValue(String text) throws ParseException
      Convert the given string into an Object representing a date.
      Specified by:
      stringToValue in class JFormattedTextField.AbstractFormatter
      Parameters:
      text - String to convert
      Returns:
      Object representing the date
      Throws:
      ParseException - if the text cannot be parsed into a date
